## Epic 3 — Skills & Talents (#30)

**Dependency:** #20 (dice catalog)
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Design the complete skill list for Heroes of Legend, mapped to the six attributes.

### Proposed Skill List (mapped to attributes)
| Attribute | Skills |
|-----------|--------|
| **Brawn** | Athletics, Intimidation, Melee Combat |
| **Fortitude** | Endurance, Survival, Resilience |
| **Agility** | Acrobatics, Stealth, Sleight of Hand, Ranged Combat |
| **Guile** | Deception, Persuasion, Streetwise, Disguise |
| **Knowledge** | Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, Religion |
| **Reason** | Alchemy, Crafting, Medicine, Insight |

### Design Requirements
- ~20 skills total (not too many, not too few)
- Each attribute governs 3-5 skills
- Each skill has clear combat AND non-combat applications
- Each skill maps to at least one dice type prerequisite
- Skills from original PDF should be preserved where they fit

### Tasks
- [ ] Extract all skills from original PDF
- [ ] Map D&D 5e skills to the new system
- [ ] Design final skill list (18-25 skills)
- [ ] Write 2-3 sentence description for each skill with example uses
- [ ] Define each skill's attribute association
- [ ] Define each skill's dice type prerequisites (if any)
- [ ] Create skill-to-dice reference table
